subcodes.first_line: O thou descendant of the illustrious Nightingale! The cry and lamentation of separation hath reached this yearning one and exerted a profound effect [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل عندلیب جلیل ناله و فغان از فراق بکوش این مشتاق رسید و تاثیر شدید نمود
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @personal instructions
